comment.body:
centroid is "center of gravity" or "center of mass"
a special weighted mean where the forces are in balance.

the center of the fly however is the center of the fly pattern.
the more asymmetrical it is, the bigger the divergence between the two
comment.raw_body:
centroid is "center of gravity" or "center of mass"
a special weighted mean where the forces are in balance.

the center of the fly however is the center of the fly pattern.
the more asymmetrical it is, the bigger the divergence between the two

comment.body: FED LOST ACCESS TO PRIVATE JOBS DATA AHEAD OF GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN Federal Reserve officials, already cut off from U.S. economic stats due to the government shutdown, no longer receive employment data from ADP. The dataset, covering 20% of private workers and usually available with a one-week delay, had been a key gauge of the job market. ADP stopped sharing the data after Fed governor Christopher Waller’s August speech highlighted the Fed’s use of the weekly payroll information.
